understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile (+) by navigating the grid so that after each horizontal move the character falls in the current gravity direction and eventually lands on the goal; landing on spikes (u/v) causes an immediate loss.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you can MOVE_LEFT or MOVE_RIGHT by one tile horizontally, and then gravity automatically pulls the character in the current gravity direction until it lands on a solid/support tile, hits a hazard, or reaches the goal. CLICK can be used on breakable/clickable tiles (e.g., x) at a specified target_position [x, y] to remove them and open/alter fall paths; clicks do not move the player. UNDO reverts the previous action if you need to recover from a bad move or click.
